title: Projects
text:
This page showcases selected geospatial and remote sensing projects developed during my Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management at the University of British Columbia.
These projects demonstrate experience in:

Geographic Information Systems (GIS)
Remote sensing
Spatial analysis
Reproducible geospatial workflows using R and Quarto

title: Projects
About
text:
I am passionate about advancing work in spatial ecology and environmental management. My goal is to contribute to global conservation efforts through the integration of traditional monitoring approaches with modern technologies in remote sensing and Geographic Information Systems.
My interests include spatial ecology, land-cover analysis, environmental monitoring, GIS, and geospatial data communication using reproducible workflows.
In my spare time, you will probably find me at a chessboard, playing Scrabble, or at the piano.

title: Oluwaseyi Ezekiel
text:
Welcome
Welcome to my e-portfolio. This website highlights my academic and professional work in geomatics for environmental management, including projects in remote sensing, GIS, spatial analysis, and reproducible geospatial workflows using R, Quarto, and related tools.


Remote Sensing
Land-cover analysis, spectral interpretation, and environmental change detection.


GIS and Spatial Analysis
Mapping workflows, spatial data processing, and environmental applications.


Reproducible Workflows
Technical communication and geospatial analysis using R, Quarto, and markdown.
